headline: GE Aerospace vs. Howmet: Which Aerospace & Defense Stock Has Greater Upside?
summary: GE vs. HWM: Both ride aerospace demand, but stronger growth estimates, stock surge and fundamentals give Howmet an edge despite a higher valuation.
